---
name: Methodology proposal / challenge
about: Propose a metric, a fairer protocol, or challenge a result as an artifact
title: "[methodology] <summary>"
labels: methodology
---

**What's the proposal or concern?**
A clear description of the change, or the result you think is an artifact of the protocol.

**Why is it fairer / more correct?**
The reasoning. If it would change the ranking, say so explicitly.

**Evidence (if challenging a result)**
How to reproduce what you're seeing from the committed scores (`results/scores/`), ideally.

**Scope**
- [ ] New / changed metric
- [ ] Aggregation or threshold policy
- [ ] Bug / correctness fix
- [ ] Other
